sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Accenture FY26Q2: 수주 221억 달러 분기 최고치, 매출 8% 증가, EPS·FCF 가이던스 상향

keyPoints.text: 2분기 신규수주는 221억 달러로 분기 기록을 경신했다. 1억 달러 이상 대형 클라이언트 수주도 41건으로 역대 최고치를 기록했다.
매출은 180억 달러로 전년 대비 8%(현지통화 기준 4%) 증가하며 가이던스 상단에 부합했고, 영업이익률은 13.8%로 30포인트 확대됐다.
연간 프리캐시플로 가이던스를 108억~115억 달러로 상향하고, EPS 및 매출 가이던스도 함께 높였다.

businessChanges.text: 컨설팅 신규수주 113억 3,000만 달러, 매니지드서비스 신규수주 107억 8,000만 달러로 양 부문이 균형 성장했으며, 수주는 가이던스 범위(175억~181억 5,000만 달러)를 상회했다.
AI 기반 대규모 전환 수요가 강하게 유지되고 있으며, 신규 전략적 인수로 역량과 규모를 확대해 클라이언트의 AI 전환을 지원하고 있다.

financialHighlights.text: 2분기 매출 180억 4,000만 달러(+8% 달러, +4% 현지통화)는 환율 순풍(+4.4%)이 기여했으며, 실질 성장률(현지통화)도 전분기 대비 견조했다.
영업현금흐름 37억 달러, 프리캐시플로 27억 달러를 창출했으며, 자사주 매입·소각 680만 주 및 배당 1.63달러/주(+10%)를 포함해 17억 달러를 주주에게 환원했다.
연간 조정 EPS 가이던스 13.65~13.90달러(+6~8%), GAAP EPS 가이던스 13.25~13.50달러(+9~11%)로 상향 제시됐다.

watchItems.text: 미국 연방 사업 약 1%p 역풍이 하반기에도 지속될지, 그리고 기록적 수주(221억 달러)가 향후 분기 매출로 전환되는 속도가 핵심 모니터링 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Document Accenture Reports Second-Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results Accenture delivers record new bookings, revenues at the top of the company’s guided range, strong profitability and robust free cash flow; Company now expects full-year fiscal 2026 revenue growth to be 3% to 5% in local currency NEW YORK; March 19, 2026 — Accenture (NYSE: ACN) reported financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 ended February 28, 2026. All comparisons are to the second quarter of fiscal 2025, unless noted otherwise. Accenture Chair and CEO Julie Sweet “We delivered record second quarter bookings of $22.1 billion, including a record 41 clients with quarterly bookings greater than $100 million, with revenues at the top of our guided range, while continuing to take significant share in a competitive market. We’re accelerating our critical work with clients to scale advanced AI across their  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.1 billion = 221억 달러; $100 million = 1억 달러; $22.1 = 22.1달러; $100 = 100달러.

and we're seeing strong AI-driven growth. Our new strategic acquisitions will further strengthen our capabilities and expand our scale to help clients create value and achieve AI-based transformation. With our deep client relationships, industry and process expertise, leading and emerging ecosystem partnerships, and unmatched execution strength, we are uniquely positioned to help clients reinvent and capture the significant opportunities ahead.” Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Key Metrics • New bookings of $22.1 billion, an increase of 6% in U.S. dollars and 1% in local currency • Revenues of $18.0 billion, an increase of 8% in U.S. dollars and 4% in local currency • Operating margin of 13.8%, an expansion of 30 basis points •  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.1 billion = 221억 달러; $18.0 billion = 180억 달러; $3.7 billion = 37억 달러; $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $22.1 = 22.1달러; $18.0 = 18.0달러; $2.93 = 2.93달러; $2.7 = 2.7달러; $3.7 = 3.7달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러; 30 basis points = 30포인트.

repurchases or redemptions of 6.8 million shares, and cash dividend payments of $1.0 billion, or $1.63 per share, a 10% increase Fiscal 2026 Business Outlook Highlights • Company now expects full-year revenue growth to be 3% to 5% in local currency. Excluding an estimated 1% impact from its U.S. federal business, company now expects revenue growth to be 4% to 6% in local currency • Now expects full-year GAAP diluted earnings per share to be in the range of $13.25 to $13.50, a 9% to 11% increase; now expects full-year adjusted 1 earnings per share to be in the range of $13.65 to $13.90, a 6% to 8% increase • Raises full-year free cash flow expectation to be in the range of $10.8 billion to $11.5 billion 1 Adjusted financial measures  Normalized numeric aliases: 6.8 million = 680만 달러; $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; $10.8 billion = 108억 달러; $11.5 billion = 115억 달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $1.63 = 1.63달러; $13.25 = 13.25달러; $13.50 = 13.50달러; $13.90 = 13.90달러; $13.65 = 13.65달러; $10.8 = 10.8달러; $11.5 = 11.5달러.

quarter of fiscal 2025 as further described in this release. 1 Q2 FY26 Financial Review New Bookings New bookings for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 were $22.11 billion, an increase of 6% in U.S. dollars and 1% in local currency compared to the second quarter of fiscal 2025. • Consulting new bookings were $11.33 billion. • Managed Services new bookings were $10.78 billion. Revenues Revenues for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 were $18.04 billion, an increase of 8% in U.S. dollars and 4% in local currency. Revenues for the quarter reflect a foreign-exchange impact of positive 4.4%, compared with the positive 3.5% impact previously assumed. Adjusting for the  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.11 billion = 221억 1,000만 달러; $11.33 billion = 113억 3,000만 달러; $10.78 billion = 107억 8,000만 달러; $18.04 billion = 180억 4,000만 달러; $17.5 billion = 175억 달러; $18.15 billion = 181억 5,000만 달러; $22.11 = 22.11달러; $11.33 = 11.33달러; $18.04 = 18.04달러; $10.78 = 10.78달러; $17.5 = 17.5달러; $18.15 = 18.15달러.
